/usr/bin/ar qc libcortexsdr_sdk.a CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/cortexsdr_sdk_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/api/cortex_sdk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/api/c_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/SparseInferenceEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/parsers/ONNXModelParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/onnx_proto/onnx.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/core/AIDecompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/core/AICompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/core/ArchiveConstants.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/streaming/StreamingCompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/utils/ModelConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/NumericalRLE.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/GzipStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/AdaptiveSDRStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/MetadataSDRStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/QuantizedTensorStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr_sdk.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/SDRIndexStorage.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcortexsdr_sdk.a
